summary: Tested comment photo attachment feature - allows users to upload photos with comments. All tests passed: Camera button visible to left of comment input, file picker accepts jpg/png/webp/heic/heif, preview (64x64px) appears with X remove button, submit enabled with photo-only (no text required), comments display small thumbnails (max 180x120), lightbox opens on click with close button. Both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports work correctly. Reply mode also shows camera button.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review: HivePostCard.js correctly imports Camera icon, handles photo state, uploads to /api/upload before comment creation
Code review: CommentItem.js CommentImage component properly implements thumbnail + lightbox with z-[99999] for modal
Code review: Backend models.py correctly adds image_url: Optional[str] = None to CommentCreate and CommentResponse
Code review: Backend routes/hive.py correctly stores and returns image_url in comment documents
tests_passed: DESKTOP: Camera button visible to left of comment input at x=657 (input at x=693)
DESKTOP: File input accepts image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp,image/heic,image/heif,.jpg,.jpeg,.png,.webp,.heic,.heif
DESKTOP: Submit button disabled when no text/photo, enabled when photo selected
DESKTOP: Photo preview appears at 64x64px with X remove button
DESKTOP: Photo removed successfully via X button
DESKTOP: Comment with photo attachment submitted successfully
DESKTOP: Comment displays image thumbnail below text
DESKTOP: Lightbox opens when clicking thumbnail with close button
MOBILE (390x844): Camera button at x=33, y=778 - fits in viewport
MOBILE: Comment input at x=69 - fits in viewport
MOBILE: Camera button is LEFT of input
MOBILE: File input found with HEIC/HEIF support
MOBILE: Reply mode shows 'replying to' indicator
MOBILE: Camera button visible in reply mode
BACKEND: Login/auth works
BACKEND: Feed fetching works with posts
BACKEND: Text-only comments work
BACKEND: Comments with image_url returned correctly
BACKEND: Reply with image works
BACKEND: Photo-only comments (content=' ', image_url present) accepted

features_verified.camera_button_position: LEFT of comment input on both desktop and mobile
features_verified.file_picker_formats: jpg, png, webp, heic, heif - all accepted
features_verified.photo_preview: 64x64px thumbnail with X remove button above input
features_verified.submit_button_logic: Disabled when empty, enabled with text OR photo (not both required)
features_verified.comment_thumbnail: Small thumbnail (max 180x120) displayed below comment text
features_verified.lightbox: Fixed inset-0 z-[99999] overlay with close button
features_verified.reply_mode: Camera button works for replies same as top-level comments
features_verified.mobile_layout: Camera button and input fit in 390px viewport without overflow
features_verified.backend_integration: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/comments accepts and stores image_url, GET returns it

seed_data_creation: Created test comment with photo on pinned post by @katie
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comment photo feature fully implemented and tested. Camera button uses data-testid='comment-camera-btn-{post_id}', file input is comment-photo-input-{post_id}, preview is comment-photo-preview-{post_id}, remove button is comment-photo-remove-{post_id}. Lightbox uses comment-image-thumb for thumbnail and comment-image-lightbox for modal. Backend stores image_url in comments collection. HEIC conversion handled via heic2any library with Canvas fallback in imageUpload.js.
